calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the Petitioner.

The Court questioned why the apartment was kept open for 15 months. Mr. Weinkauf explained that the investigator assigned to the case was a new employee, and he did not get instructions for sale of the tangible personal property. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Nov-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made. The Court continued the matter to November 7, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Clerk will contact Mr. Weinkauf to inform him to appear on that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.
